topSites.label: Label
topSites.blockConfirm: This site will be removed from your Top Sites and won't be suggested again. You can manage blocked sites in settings.

settings.imageRecommendation: Recommendation: Use images with a resolution of 1920x1080 or higher.
settings.disableFloorpStartDescription: When enabled, Floorp Start will be replaced by the classic Firefox new tab / home page.
settings.restartRequired: Requires browser restart to take full effect.

splitView.title: Try Split View for multitasking
splitView.description: View multiple tabs side by side. Right-click a tab and select "Open in Split View" to get started.

panelSidebar.title: Pin websites to the Panel Sidebar
panelSidebar.description: Access your favorite sites, notes, and bookmarks from the sidebar while browsing.

workspaces.title: Organize tabs with Workspaces
workspaces.description: Group tabs by purpose — work, personal, research — and switch between them instantly.

mouseGesture.title: Navigate with Mouse Gestures
mouseGesture.description: Hold right-click and drag to perform actions like going back, closing tabs, and more.

shortcuts.title: Customize Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.description: Assign your own keyboard shortcuts for browser actions in Floorp Hub.
